name: Guise of the Smirking Devil (Greater)
description:
This ice-blue half-mask is adorned with a wicked silver grin that covers the wearer's mouth, leaving the rest of the face uncovered. You gain a +3 item bonus to Intimidation checks.

Activate—Hideous Wail 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The mask casts a 9th-rank

Each living creature in a takes |options:area-damage] damage and must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes full damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is [[/r 1d4]].

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is Drained 4.
